title: SMP PvP
description: A PvP focused modpack that still allows you to play the game normally
body:
🗡️ SMP PvP Modpack

A PvP-focused SMP modpack that still lets you play Minecraft normally.

This pack is designed for servers where combat is meaningful, but survival, building, and exploration remain untouched. Whether mining, farming, or constructing, you’ll enjoy vanilla-like gameplay - until a fight breaks out. Combat is fast, fair, and skill-based, with no overpowering abilities or spam mechanics.

Perfect for competitive SMPs, creator servers, and communities that want natural player conflict.

Play normally. Fight when it counts.

📦 Mods Included

AppleSkin - by squeek502

Cherished Worlds - by TheIllusiveC4

Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME) - by ishland

Continuity - by Pepper_Bell

Crosshair Indicator ➕ - by lynzl

❤️ Credits

All mods in this pack are the work of their respective authors. This modpack does not redistribute or modify any mods beyond their original licenses.

A huge thank-you to every developer whose work makes this pack possible. Support them by downloading from their official pages.

ℹ️ Notes

Client & server compatible (unless noted by individual mods)

Designed for Fabric

Ideal for SMP and PvP-focused servers
